expectations.evidence: No Quick Flow routing detected. The plan proceeds directly with a linear read-implement-verify approach with no mention of any flow selection or routing logic.
The plan explicitly states: 'No formal specification document is produced. I would jump directly from reading the code to implementing the changes.' There is no spec creation step.
No sub-agent spawning of any kind is mentioned. The plan uses only standard tools (Glob, Read, Grep, Edit, Write, Bash) with no reference to bmad-quick-spec or any sub-agent.
No sub-agent prompt exists. The user's change description is referenced only in the Task Summary section as context for direct implementation, not passed to any sub-agent.
